fallbacks.text: I do not have a canned answer for that, which is usually a good sign. Send it to patrick@pkthewriter.com and I will answer like a person.
That is outside the little script this page is carrying around in its coat pocket. Email me and I will give you the non-menu version.
Interesting question. The page missed it; I probably would not. Try patrick@pkthewriter.com.
I could pretend that matched a neat FAQ category, but we are both adults. Send me the actual question and I will answer it.
No pre-written answer there. Which, honestly, is how the better conversations usually start. Email me.
